mapper.select: SELECT ta.assignment_id AS assignmentId, ta.student_id AS studentId, stu.real_name AS studentName, stu.student_no AS studentNo, ta.topic_id AS topicId, t.topic_title AS topicTitle, t.topic_source AS topicSource, CASE t.topic_source WHEN 1 THEN '校内' WHEN 2 THEN '校外(协同开发)' ELSE '未知' END AS topicSourceDesc, ta.assigned_teacher_id AS assignedTeacherId, tea.real_name AS assignedTeacherName, ab.real_name AS assignedByName, DATE_FORMAT(ta.assign_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS assignTime, DATE_FORMAT(ta.cancel_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS cancelTime, ta.assign_status AS assignStatus, CASE ta.assign_status WHEN 1 THEN '已指派' WHEN 0 THEN '已取消' ELSE '未知' END AS assignStatusDesc FROM teacher_assignment ta INNER JOIN user_info stu ON ta.student_id = stu.user_id INNER JOIN topic_info t ON ta.topic_id = t.topic_id INNER JOIN user_info tea ON ta.assigned_teacher_id = tea.user_id INNER JOIN user_info ab ON ta.assigned_by = ab.user_id WHERE ta.deleted = 0 AND t.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ORDER BY ta.assign_time DESC
